_meta.doc: Whole-floor RECIPES (generator roadmap #5, data half). A template authors floor-scale INTENT — size/style overrides, hazard/roster overrides, and ANCHORS that force a prefab at a named room role or drop an authored hook/quest event — and lets the runtime generator fill the rest. The bridge to hybrid authoring (hand-place quest spots, generate the filler).
_meta.how: main.js resolves a template id from the act node (node.gen.template) or the biome (biome.template), looks it up here, and passes it to GameMapGen.generateFloor as opts.template. Absent template → generation is unchanged.

fields.size: { w, h } — override the floor dimensions
fields.hazard: partial override merged over the biome hazard (spikeText/spikeDmg/sensorText/sensorSurveil/sensorWeight)
fields.anchors: [ { role, prefab? , event? } ] — role: 'entrance'|'alpha'|'deepest'|'shallow'|'random'. prefab = a prefab id (incl. template-only ids like 'shrine'). event = an authored event { name, graphic?, trigger?, through?, commands:[...] } placed at a floor cell in that room.

_meta.note: Authored event text supports the engine's runtime tokens ([name]/[designation]/[v:id]/[s:id]).

commands.text: A worn stone, older than the System. Faint letters remain.
"They came down here to be unseen. The System followed them anyway."
